repositories.test_command: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
repositories.coverage_command: uv run --with coverage==7.5.4 coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests && uv run --with coverage==7.5.4 coverage xml

repositories.test_command: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
repositories.coverage_command: uv run --with coverage coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests && uv run --with coverage coverage xml

repositories.test_command: npm test && uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
repositories.coverage_command: npm test -- --coverage && uv run --with coverage coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests && uv run --with coverage coverage xml
